scripts.format: prettier --write README.md 05-decisions.md 07-security-rules.md 09-testing-guide.md 11-tasks.md tasks/tasks-update.md package.json package-lock.json backend/package.json backend/tsconfig.json backend/src/**/*.ts firebase/**/*.json firebase/**/*.md firebase/**/*.ts .github/workflows/*.yml eslint.config.mjs analysis_options.yaml tools/*.mjs
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md 05-decisions.md 07-security-rules.md 09-testing-guide.md 11-tasks.md tasks/tasks-update.md package.json package-lock.json backend/package.json backend/tsconfig.json backend/src/**/*.ts firebase/**/*.json firebase/**/*.md firebase/**/*.ts .github/workflows/*.yml eslint.config.mjs analysis_options.yaml tools/*.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run format:check
scripts.test:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,storage --config firebase/firebase.json --project demo-bike-local "node --import tsx firebase/scripts/seed-emulators.ts && node --test --import tsx firebase/tests/emulator-seed.test.ts"
scripts.test:security-rules: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,storage --config firebase/firebase.json --project demo-bike-local "node --test --import tsx firebase/tests/firestore.rules.test.ts firebase/tests/storage.rules.test.ts"
